title: mentha nepalensis
intro: Mentha nepalensis, also known as Nepalese mint, is a species of plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mentha nepalensis include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea and headaches, and reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Mentha nepalensis include teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
